## Learning Objectives

-	Acquire knowledge about the scientific foundation, economic rationale, systems complexity, and policy implications of climate change, energy transition, and human society.  
-	Identify the energy root of climate challenges, and the technological, economic, societal, and behavioral transformations needed to enable an energy transition.  
-	Apply energy project economics, energy systems analysis, cost-benefit analysis, life-cycle analysis, and other analytical concepts in energy and climate systems and policy analysis.  
-	Use evidence-based analysis to understand and contribute to effective policy discussions and debates.
